# Bill Bergquist — Software Engineer & Web Developer

## About
Bill Bergquist is a Staff Software Engineer with 14+ years of experience building web applications. Based in the Denver/Lakewood, Colorado area. Currently at Kasa, leading frontend architecture with React, TypeScript, and Node.js.

## Services
Web design and development for small businesses in Denver, Lakewood, and the Colorado Front Range. Services include business websites, landing pages, website redesigns, and ongoing support.

- Website: https://billbergquist.dev/services
- Email: services@billbergquist.dev

## Projects
- CreatiCalc (https://creaticalc.com) — Free calculator suite for content creators
- Sports Shortcuts (https://sportsshortcuts.com) — Injury alert generator for sports reporters
- Critter Care (https://critter-care.com) — Pet sitting business website

## Games
- Minesweeper: Descent (https://billbergquist.dev/arcade/descent) — Roguelike minesweeper browser game
